allow: Bash(python3 -c "from datetime import datetime; import pytz; et = pytz.timezone\('America/New_York'\); now = et.localize\(datetime.now\(pytz.utc\).replace\(tzinfo=None\)\) if False else datetime.now\(pytz.utc\).astimezone\(et\); print\('ET:', now.strftime\('%H:%M:%S %Z'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta; utc = datetime.now\(timezone.utc\); et = utc - timedelta\(hours=4\); print\('ET \(approx EDT\):', et.strftime\('%H:%M:%S'\)\)")

Bash(python -c "from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta; utc = datetime.now\(timezone.utc\); et = utc - timedelta\(hours=4\); print\('ET \(EDT\):', et.strftime\('%H:%M:%S'\)\); h,m = et.hour, et.minute; print\('Market open' if \(h > 9 or \(h == 9 and m >= 30\)\) and h < 16 else 'Market closed'\)")

Bash(python -c "from datetime import datetime; import pytz; et = pytz.timezone\('America/New_York'\); now = et.localize\(datetime.now\(pytz.utc\).replace\(tzinfo=None\)\) if False else datetime.now\(pytz.utc\).astimezone\(et\); print\(now.strftime\('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %Z'\)\); h,m = now.hour, now.minute; open_ = \(h > 9 or \(h==9 and m>=30\)\) and h < 16; print\('OPEN' if open_ else 'CLOSED'\)")
Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('copy_trading/state.json'\)\); print\('last_checked:', d.get\('last_checked'\)\); print\('executed IDs:', len\(d.get\('executed_ids', []\)\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "from datetime import datetime; import pytz; et = pytz.timezone\('US/Eastern'\); now = datetime.now\(et\); print\(f'ET: {now.strftime\(\\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %Z\\"\)}'\); print\(f'Weekday: {now.weekday\(\)}'\); print\(f'Hour: {now.hour}, Minute: {now.minute}'\)")

Bash(python -c "from datetime import datetime; import pytz; et = pytz.timezone\('US/Eastern'\); now = datetime.now\(et\); print\(f'ET: {now.strftime\(\\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %Z\\"\)}'\); print\(f'Weekday: {now.weekday\(\)}'\); print\(f'Hour: {now.hour}, Minute: {now.minute}'\)")
Bash(python -c "from datetime import datetime; import pytz; et=pytz.timezone\('America/New_York'\); print\('ET:', datetime.now\(et\).strftime\('%H:%M:%S %Z %A'\)\)")

Bash(python -c "from datetime import datetime; import pytz; et = pytz.timezone\('America/New_York'\); now = datetime.now\(et\); print\(f'ET time: {now.strftime\(\\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %Z\\"\)}'\); print\(f'Weekday: {now.weekday\(\)} \(0=Mon, 6=Sun\)'\); is_open = now.weekday\(\) < 5 and \(now.hour > 9 or \(now.hour == 9 and now.minute >= 30\)\) and now.hour < 16; print\(f'Market open: {is_open}'\)")
Bash(python -c "from datetime import datetime; import pytz; et = pytz.timezone\('US/Eastern'\); now = datetime.now\(et\); print\(now.strftime\('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %Z'\)\)")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Command soffice -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source; if \(-not \(Get-Command soffice -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)\) { 'LibreOffice not found' }")
Bash(gh pr create --title 'feat: LLM coding eval harness — Qwen3/DeepSeek/GLM comparison' --body ' *)

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_VideoController | Select-Object Name, @{N='VRAM_GB';E={[math]::Round\($_.AdapterRAM/1GB,1\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize; Get-CimInstance Win32_ComputerSystem | Select-Object @{N='RAM_GB';E={[math]::Round\($_.TotalPhysicalMemory/1GB,1\)}}; Get-PSDrive C | Select-Object @{N='FreeGB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Free/1GB,1\)}})

PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Ollama\\ollama.exe", "$env:ProgramFiles\\Ollama\\ollama.exe"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; try { \(Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:11434/api/tags -TimeoutSec 3\).models | Select-Object name, size } catch { Write-Output "API not running" })

Bash(OLLAMA_NUM_GPU=999 OLLAMA_NUM_THREAD=16 OLLAMA_NUM_CTX=4096 OLLAMA_KEEP_ALIVE=30m OLLAMA_TIMEOUT_MS=900000 ONLY_MODELS=qwen7b QWEN_MODEL=qwen2.5-coder:32b-instruct-q4_K_M QWEN_LABEL='Qwen2.5-Coder 32B' OUT=results-qwen32b.json ANSWERS_DIR=answers-32b node dist/run-eval.js)
Bash(ONLY_MODELS=codex CODEX_LABEL='OpenAI GPT-4o \(Codex\)' OUT=results-codex.json ANSWERS_DIR=answers-frontier node dist/run-eval.js)

Bash(OLLAMA_NUM_GPU=999 OLLAMA_NUM_THREAD=16 OLLAMA_NUM_CTX=4096 OLLAMA_KEEP_ALIVE=30m OLLAMA_TIMEOUT_MS=900000 ONLY_MODELS=deepseek DEEPSEEK_MODEL=deepseek-coder:33b-instruct-q4_K_M DEEPSEEK_LABEL='DeepSeek-Coder 33B' OUT=results-deep33b.json ANSWERS_DIR=answers-32b node dist/run-eval.js)
